description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages scheduled, prepare, test, provision, deploy, confidenceCheck, and dast. Add a deploy job that runs on the default image, saves environment_url.txt as an artifact (expire 1 hour), echoes "Render should be deploying the app while this pipeline is running.", sleeps 5 minutes when the branch is master or preview, and writes https://plaudit.pub or https://preview.plaudit.pub to environment_url.txt. Add a build_extension job using the node:10 image that runs only on changes under extension/** for master or merge_requests, produces artifacts in extension/web-ext-artifacts/ (expire 1 month), and executes: export WORKSPACE_NAME=`echo $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG | cut -c 1-26 | sed -e 's/-$//'`; if [[ $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == "master" ]]; then export SUBDOMAIN="www"; else export SUBDOMAIN="$WORKSPACE_NAME-review"; fi; export APP_URL="https://$SUBDOMAIN.plaudit.pub"; cd extension; yarn; if [[ $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME != "master" ]]; then node tag_prerelease_version.js; fi; yarn run build; if [[ $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == "master" ]]; then export CHANNEL="listed"; else export CHANNEL="unlisted"; fi; yarn run web-ext sign --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --channel="$CHANNEL" --id="${WEBEXTENSION_UUID}" --api-key="$WEB_EXT_API_KEY" --api-secret="$WEB_EXT_API_SECRET" | sed -e "s|$WEB_EXT_API_KEY|***|g" | sed -e "s|$WEB_EXT_API_SECRET|***|g" || [ $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == "master" ]; unset WEB_EXT_API_KEY; unset WEB_EXT_API_SECRET; if [[ $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == "master" ]]; then yarn run web-ext build --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts; node publish_chrome.js; else echo "Not publishing to the Chrome web store as we are not on the master branch."; fi. Add an a11y job with before_script "export a11y_urls=$(cat environment_url.txt)" that depends on deploy and runs only on push events in the confidenceCheck stage. Add a browser_performance job that depends on deploy, runs only on the master branch (excluding schedules), sets variable URL to https://plaudit.pub, and runs in confidenceCheck. Add a test job using node:20 that runs "cd website", "npm ci", and "npm run lint" in the test stage. Add an e2e job using the mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.49.1-jammy image, parallelism 7, artifacts (playwright-report, junit report, expire 1 week, always), that depends on deploy and runs only outside schedules, executing: wipCommits=`git log --grep=^WIP`; if [ -n "$wipCommits" ] && [ "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" != "master" ]; then echo "WIP commits detected; skipping tests."; exit 0; fi; export APP_URL=`cat environment_url.txt`; cd e2e-tests; npm ci; npm test -- --shard=$CI_NODE_INDEX/$CI_NODE_TOTAL in confidenceCheck. Add a reuse job using the fsfe/reuse:0.10.0 image (entrypoint disabled) that runs "reuse lint" in confidenceCheck and is excluded from schedules. Add export_archive.org and export_crossref scheduled jobs using python:3 and alpine images respectively, each running only on schedules with their wget, pip, and ia commands (for archive) or apk add wget and wget (for crossref). Include code_quality, sast, and dast jobs (with allow_failure for dast) in confidenceCheck and dast stages via the official SAST, DAST, Code‑Quality, Browser‑Performance and Accessibility templates.
